query:
SELECT bl.liverId, l.name as liverName, b.name as brandName, COUNT(bl.id) as streamCount, SUM(bl.gmv) as totalGmv, SUM(bl.salesAmount) as totalSales
FROM brand_livestreams bl
LEFT JOIN livers l ON l.id = bl.liverId
LEFT JOIN brands b ON b.id = bl.brandId
WHERE bl.liverId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bl.liverId, l.name, b.name
ORDER BY bl.liverId, totalGmv DESC
LIMIT 30;
